slices.title: Improver review UI: ecosystem-status panel, verify-probe extension, reapply-failed status support

designAudit.verdict: skipped - Slice B UI change is small/additive (one new tab, one new badge state on an existing card layout), not a new surface; matched existing visual conventions exactly (colors, badge shape, card layout) with no deviation warranting a separate audit pass

blockers.detail: Codex's own exec sandbox is workspace-write [workdir, /tmp, $TMPDIR] (printed in its own session banner). Its independent functional pass ran `node fittings/seed/improver/scripts/improver.mjs run-now` with default env, which writes to ~/.garrison/improver - outside that whitelist - and hit EPERM.
blockers.remediationAttempted: node fittings/seed/improver/scripts/improver.mjs run-now (inside codex exec -s workspace-write) -> EPERM opening ~/.garrison/improver/ecosystem-update-log.json
blockers.compensatingEvidence: Codex's own isolated fixture-based functional checks (constructed and run entirely by Codex itself, exercising runEcosystemUpdate/runReapplySweep directly) PASSED cleanly. I independently re-ran the identical CLI invocation outside Codex's sandbox (IMPROVER_DATA=<temp dir> node improver.mjs run-now) and confirmed exit 0 with both logs written correctly. A vision-verified asciinema walkthrough (both per-beat and holistic gates passed) additionally records the real restore-a-clobbered-note scenario end-to-end.

blockers.detail: Codex's Playwright pass could not launch any browser engine (Chromium/Firefox/WebKit all aborted at OS-level Mach-port bootstrap_check_in before any page loaded) - a macOS sandbox restriction in Codex's own exec environment.
blockers.remediationAttempted: codex exec -s workspace-write -c sandbox_workspace_write.network_access=true ... (tried chromium.launch(), firefox.launch(), webkit.launch() - all three aborted with Permission denied / SIGABRT at browser-process bootstrap)
blockers.compensatingEvidence: Codex's static review (codexReview, 2 rounds, clean approve, found and I fixed 2 real bugs) already covered these exact files. I independently drove the real running server myself via claude-in-chrome (not Codex) and confirmed the full acceptance with zero console errors. A vision-verified browser walkthrough (both per-beat and holistic gates passed) additionally records the same scenario end-to-end, including the autonomy-untouched proof.
